purpose: To inform potential customers about HubSpot's AI-Powered Smart CRM software, highlight its features and benefits, provide social proof, and guide them towards requesting a demo or signing up for a free CRM plan.
importantSections: Your CRM Just Got Smarter (Key benefits)
See Your Customers Clearly (Data unification features)
Get Your Team on the Same Page (Data quality and team collaboration features)
All your tools, connected in one place (Integrations and extensibility)
Real Growth, Real Stories (Customer testimonials and statistics)
Smart CRM Pricing That Grows With You
summary: This page introduces HubSpot's AI-Powered Smart CRM software, detailing how it unifies data, automates tasks, and provides teams with crucial context for decision-making. It showcases features for data clarity, team alignment, and integrations, supported by customer success stories and detailed pricing plans. The page aims to convert visitors into demo requests or free CRM sign-ups.
